title: Thai-Style Beef and Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir-fry made with beef shin, mixed vegetables, and a blend of Thai spices.

ingredients.name: fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Used to add depth of flavor

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of soothe oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of soothe oil to the skillet.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the gloopin and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, brown sugar, and chili flakes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Stir in the soothe paste to thicken the sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the beef is cooked through.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
